weeklyConsumption: Total water consumption for the week
monthlyConsumption: Total water consumption for the month
monthlyConsumptionn: Possibly alternate or normalized monthly consumption readings
weeklyConsumptionn: Possibly alternate or normalized weekly consumption readings
1_Flow_ls: Flow rate in liters/second for meter 1
2_Flow_ls: Flow rate in liters/second for meter 2
3_Flow_ls: Flow rate in liters/second for meter 3
1_Flow_m3h: Flow rate in cubic meters/hour for meter 1
2_Flow_m3h: Flow rate in cubic meters/hour for meter 2
3_Flow_m3h: Flow rate in cubic meters/hour for meter 3
Pump_X_OL_Trip: Status bit for pump overload trip
Pump_X_Remote: Status bit for pump remote operation
outlet_pressure: Calculated outlet pressure, derived from average of 1_Pressure and 2_Pressure
head: Head
dailyConsumption: Total water consumption for the day
dailyConsumption1: Individual daily consumption for pump or meter 1
dailyConsumption2: Individual daily consumption for pump or meter 2
dailyConsumption3: Individual daily consumption for pump or meter 3
Pump_1_EM_1_VRY: Voltage between R and Y phase for Pump 1
Pump_1_EM_1_VYB: Voltage between Y and B phase for Pump 1
Pump_1_EM_1_VBR: Voltage between B and R phase for Pump 1
Pump_1_EM_1_IR: Current in R phase for Pump 1
Pump_1_EM_1_IY: Current in Y phase for Pump 1
Pump_1_EM_1_IB: Current in B phase for Pump 1
Pump_1_EM_1_Freq: Frequency of power supply to Pump 1
Pump_1_EM_1_KW: Active Power in kW consumed by Pump 1
Pump_1_EM_1_KWH: Energy consumed by Pump 1 in kWh
Pump_2_EM_1_VRY: Voltage between R and Y phase for Pump 2
Pump_2_EM_1_VYB: Voltage between Y and B phase for Pump 2
Pump_2_EM_1_VBR: Voltage between B and R phase for Pump 2
Pump_2_EM_1_IR: Current in R phase for Pump 2
Pump_2_EM_1_IY: Current in Y phase for Pump 2
Pump_2_EM_1_IB: Current in B phase for Pump 2
Pump_2_EM_1_Freq: Frequency of power supply to Pump 2
Pump_2_EM_1_KW: Active Power in kW consumed by Pump 2
Pump_2_EM_1_KWH: Energy consumed by Pump 2 in kWh
P1_max_Deviation: Max deviation in voltage/current for Pump 1
P2_max_Deviation: Max deviation in voltage/current for Pump 2
RTU_id: ID of the Remote Terminal Unit
alarm_bit: Binary flag for active alarm state
prev_pump_X_ON_Status: Previous ON status snapshot for pump
Pump_Status: Computed or summarized status of pump system
Max_Pump_X_Daily_RH: Maximum daily runtime of Pump X
recommendation: Output text generated from performance curve analysis
V1_max_Deviation: Voltage imbalance data for input source 1
V2_max_Deviation: Voltage imbalance data for input source 2
Bypass_Valve_Mode: Dashboard toggle for bypass valve mode
Show_Water_in_Pipe: Visual effect toggle for water in pipe
Water_Animation_Speed: Speed of water animation on GUI
Show_Water_In_Pipe_X: Visual effect for specific pipe X
Show_Water_Bypass_Mode_Only: Visual toggle for bypass mode only
